title: Auto Stop Mod
description:
A mod that automaticly stops a Server if no players are Online.
If can send a Message to a Discord Server through a Webhook.
body:
A Mod that automaticly turns of a Server if no Players are Online.
It can send a Message to a Discord Server through a Webhook.
The Webhook, the time it takes for no Player to be Online and the time between the Checks can be customised in the config
